topic.what: Tool-augmented ReAct agent for automated SystemVerilog Assertion (SVA) generation from natural language specifications
topic.how: Two-phase approach: Phase A uses RAG over AST-indexed RTL and JasperGold structural queries for context gathering; Phase B generates SVA and iteratively refines using JasperGold formal proof feedback over up to 3 verification rounds
topic.why_matters: Reduces expertise burden in hardware verification, addresses LLM limitations in signal references and timing constraints, provides formal correctness guarantees for generated assertions

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of generated SVA with valid SystemVerilog syntax
characteristics.context: Compared against prior LLM-based SVA generation methods

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of generated SVA that pass formal verification (proven or vacuously proven)
characteristics.evidence: Ablation study confirms orthogonal contributions of RAG, JG metadata, and verification loop
characteristics.context: Formal verification via JasperGold bounded proof with vacuity analysis

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum ReAct iterations for design context collection in Phase A
characteristics.evidence: ReAct agent autonomously decides when context is sufficient
characteristics.context: Tool-augmented semantic search and structural analysis

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum refinement iterations using JasperGold feedback in Phase B
characteristics.context: Properties classified as proven, falsified, or undetermined

characteristics.what_itasures: Number of AST semantic chunk types for knowledge base indexing
characteristics.evidence: Module interface, always block, instance, assign decomposition
characteristics.context: Four semantic chunk types enable modular RTL decomposition

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of tool categories available to ReAct agent
characteristics.evidence: Retrieval tools (vector DB) and structural analysis tools (JasperGold)
characteristics.context: Dynamic tool selection enables adaptive context gathering

good_for: RTL assertion generation from natural language

novelty: Agentic context synthesis via ReAct loop with autonomous tool selection
Solver-in-the-loop refinement with JasperGold formal proof feedback
AST-indexed RAG with 4 semantic chunk types for modular RTL decomposition
Comprehensive ablation quantifying orthogonal contributions of RAG, JG metadata, and verification loop
Bridges LLM natural language capabilities with hardware formal verification rigor
open_problems: Scaling to larger and more complex SoC designs
Improving vacuity detection to reduce false positives
Reducing computational overhead of multi-round verification
Integration with additional EDA tools beyond JasperGold
Evaluating on production designs with expert review
